# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the working-tree diff plus key reconciliation/query implementation paths. The change set only appends events in `journal.ndjson` and adds `active_run.stage_resolution_snapshot` data in `run.json`; runtime logic files were unchanged. I found no concrete correctness or safety regression introduced by this patch.

## Amendments

None.
